atten3.ptxt: When installing parts, coat the parts indicated by arrows with power steering fluid (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL VANE PUMP HOUSING OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Coat a new vane pump housing oil seal lip with power steering fluid.
Using SST and a press, install the vane pump housing oil seal.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the oil seal is installed facing in the correct direction as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL VANE PUMP SHAFT WITH PULLEY

s2.ptxt: Coat the inside surface of the bushing in the vane pump front housing with power steering fluid.
Gradually insert the vane pump shaft with pulley.

atten3.ptxt: Do not damage the oil seal lip in the front housing.

atten4.ptxt: Wrap protective tape around the spline of the vane pump shaft with pulley in order to prevent damage to the oil seal.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL VANE PUMP FRONT SIDE PLATE

s2.ptxt: Coat a new O-ring with power steering fluid and install it into the vane pump front housing.
Coat a new O-ring with power steering fluid and install it onto the vane pump front side plate.
Align the notch of the vane pump front side plate with that of the vane pump front housing, and install the vane pump front side plate.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the vane pump front side plate is installed facing in the correct direction.

s2.ptxt: Align the notch of the cam ring with that of the vane pump front side plate, and install the vane pump cam ring with the inscribed mark facing upward.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the vane pump cam ring is installed facing in the correct direction.

s2.ptxt: Install the vane pump rotor.

atten4.ptxt: Vane pump rotor can be installed in both directions.

s2.ptxt: Coat the 10 vane pump plates with power steering fluid.
Install the vane pump plates with the round end facing outward.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the vane pump plates are installed facing in the correct direction.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL VANE PUMP SHAFT SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver and a snap ring expander, install a new vane pump shaft snap ring onto the vane pump shaft with pulley.
Coat a new O-ring with power steering fluid and install it onto the vane pump rear housing.
Align the straight pin of the vane pump rear housing with the notches of the vane pump cam ring, vane pump front side plate, and vane pump front housing.
Install the vane pump rear housing with the 4 bolts.
Check that the pump rotates smoothly without abnormal noise.
Temporarily install the service bolt.
Using a torque wrench, check the pump rotating torque.
If the rotating torque is not as specified, check the vane pump housing oil seal.
Coat the flow control valve assembly with power steering fluid.
Install the flow control valve compression spring and the flow control valve assembly to the vane pump front housing.
Coat a new O-ring with power steering fluid and install it onto the pressure port union.
Install the pressure port union to the vane pump front housing.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL POWER STEERING FLUID PRESSURE SWITCH

s2.ptxt: Coat the new O-ring attached to the new power steering fluid pressure switch with power steering fluid.
Install the power steering fluid pressure switch to the vane pump assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use a power steering fluid pressure switch that has been subjected an impact; for example, due to it having been dropped.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL POWER STEERING SUCTION PORT UNION

s2.ptxt: Coat a new O-ring with power steering fluid and install it to the power steering suction port union.
Install the power steering suction port union to the vane pump assembly with the bolt.
